components.html:
Practical AI adoption

Clear guidance shaped around how your organisation works.
components.css: .adaptiva-card{max-width:22rem;padding:1.5rem;border:1px solid rgba(13,27,42,.12);border-radius:1.5rem;background:#fff;color:#22344d;font:400 1rem/1.65 Montserrat,Arial,sans-serif;box-shadow:0 12px 30px rgba(13,27,42,.07)}.adaptiva-card h3{margin:0 0 1rem;color:#0d1b2a;font:600 1.52rem/1.12 'Cormorant Garamond','Times New Roman',serif;letter-spacing:-.02em}.adaptiva-card p{margin:0}

components.name: Form Control
components.description: A quiet, structured contact input with a visible focus-within state.

narrative.overview: A calm, assured current that makes complex technology directional, useful, and human. The shipped system uses generous white space, deep navy, restrained gold, blue-grey atmosphere, editorial serif headlines, and practical sans-serif copy. The attached July 2026 original homepage PNG is the primary art-direction reference for recovering a taller cinematic hero, more visible wave depth, stronger navy-and-gold contrast, and more architectural calls to action.
keyCharacteristics: Navy-and-gold adaptive wave imagery as the signature brand asset
Cormorant Garamond display type paired with Montserrat
Bright content surfaces contrasted with committed navy moments
Gold used as a directional contour and action color
Human outcomes immediately following expressive technology imagery

rules.name: The Gold Contour Rule
rules.body: Gold identifies a meaningful edge, word, action, or transition; it is not general decoration.

rules.name: The Mockup Contrast Rule
rules.body: Let navy occupy meaningful area and gold cut through it decisively in first-view brand moments.

rules.name: The Two-Line Promise Rule
rules.body: The homepage H1 is one clear promise over no more than two intentional desktop lines, with one gold phrase.

rules.name: The Image-First Depth Rule
rules.body: Use the layered wave artwork and tonal contrast before adding a container or shadow.

dos: Do use the attached original homepage PNG as the primary composition reference for hero work.
Do preserve the wave's navy depth, luminous network, and gold contour.
Do place practical human and organisational outcomes immediately after expressive technology imagery.
Do maintain semantic structure, keyboard access, visible focus, contrast, responsive layouts, and reduced motion.
donts: Don't resemble a generic AI startup.
Don't use neon technology spectacle, interchangeable SaaS layouts, or abstract futurism without substance.
Don't fade the signature wave into a generic pale technology texture.
Don't use gradient text, nested cards, or repeated tracked eyebrows.
Don't add new colored side-stripe borders to cards or callouts.
